indicator_description: Monthly and annual area-average temperature rankings based on ERA5 2 m temperature.
title: Yukon monthly temperature rankings
subtitle: ERA5, 1979-2026
description: Monthly and annual area-average 2 m temperature rankings. Rank 1 is the warmest year for that month or annual row.
source: ERA5 2 m temperature from Copernicus Climate Change Service / ECMWF
